name: Rajib Sahoo
title: Lead Software Engineer
about: Lead Software Engineer with 12+ years of experience designing high-scale distributed backend systems for global banking and financial services. Expertise in Java 21, Spring Boot, Microservices, Kafka, GraphQL, and cloud-native architecture. Experienced in leading end-to-end delivery of enterprise lending platforms while driving API governance, engineering standards, and AI-assisted software development using LLMs, RAG, and Spring AI.

bullets: Architected and delivered a high-scale corporate lending platform covering the complete credit lifecycle, including contract orchestration, interest accrual, NPA provisioning, and bill discounting.
Built an event-driven microservices ecosystem using Java 21, Spring Boot 3, and Kafka, with automated deployments to OpenShift using Helm.
Established API-first standards across the lending division by designing and governing GraphQL and REST APIs, improving consistency, scalability, and developer productivity.
Integrated LLM-based developer tooling using Spring AI and RAG techniques to improve engineering productivity and accelerate enterprise code understanding.
Owned the architecture and end-to-end delivery of the NG Trade Invoice Financing platform using scalable microservices and event-driven workflows.
Engineered high-throughput distributed systems with Spring Boot, Kafka, and GraphQL/REST APIs to deliver reliable and scalable transaction processing.
Drove technical design decisions, established API standards, and mentored engineers to improve system resilience, maintainability, and consistency.
Built and maintained RESTful microservices using Java 8 and Spring Boot for an insurance-domain platform.
Implemented persistence with Spring Data JPA / Hibernate over Oracle, and wrote unit and integration tests with JUnit and Mockito.
Leveraged Java 8 streams, lambdas, and the Collections framework to refactor legacy modules for readability and performance.
Developed enterprise Java web applications using Spring MVC, Hibernate, and JSP/Servlets on Tomcat, delivered with Maven, for a telecommunications-domain system.
Designed and consumed REST APIs backed by DB2 with hand-tuned SQL.
Worked across the full SDLC (design, development, testing, and production support), consistently delivering against tight release deadlines.

education.institution: Biju Patnaik University of Technology, Bhubaneswar

certifications: Certified Kubernetes Application Developer (CKAD) / Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA)
achievements: Past Vice President of Education, Standard Chartered Toastmasters Club
